note: Source repository for OPM Flow and related simulator components.

note: Primary open-source CFD project used as an enabler for distributed engineering and turbomachinery simulation concepts.

note: Open-source engineering optimization platform that integrates with OpenFOAM and supports design optimization concepts.

title: OpenGeoSys
note: Open-source THMC simulation project relevant to geothermal, CO2 storage, and subsurface energy systems.

title: GEOS: Open-Source Simulator for Subsurface Energy Systems
note: Open-source simulator for geologic carbon storage, geothermal systems, underground energy storage, and oil and gas problems.
